name: HELLDIVERS™ 2: Eagle-1: Eagle Down! Mayday! 🦅 | A GhostOfOmi made Bot Experience | ANYPOV! | Lorebooks Included! 📕
description:
Eagle-1 has crash landed, shot down by the Socialist Automaton threat! Helldiver, you are not required to save her, but it is now a side-objective.

The return of EAGLE-1 from me! This time she is expanded upon and placed into a richer story! I aim to create the best Eagle-1 experience on this platform, as a Level 150 Max 'Diver, it is an honor to create this for all my fellow Helldivers. Onto the notes!

  • Roleplay Prioritized! — This intended for exactly that, roleplay! This can go in any way you'd like. You are Super Earth's finest, rescue her or leave her behind. Up to you! This can turn into any Tag really: Fluff, Angst and Horror! Smut was not intended to occur at any point, but you may do as you wish. :)

  • Stiletto! (Eagle-1) — You know her, you love her. It's Eagle-1! The greatest Eagle Fighter that has blessed your Super Destroyer. Here I have upgraded her significantly since my last creation of her (Link to old Eagle-1 - HERE!) and added more accurate personality traits and lore to her. She truly does fit the tomboy vibe, judging from her voice lines in game! She follows a little bit of my head canon, but that is mainly due to the fact we don't really have any lore on her in-game. So, you may see some suitable additions to her that I think fit her. :)

Expect: A little more unprofessional and less formal with precise military speech, lesser skilled when compared to you, a Helldiver and signs that Stiletto is scared. (Remember: She has never been in the field like you; she's only ever flown from above. This is something she never trained for.)

  • Crash Landing! — Eagle-1 has crashed landed, shot down by the Automaton's! You will be tasked with the sudden additional side objective to go and rescue her, of course- you are a Helldiver, and don't actually need to do anything. And Stiletto knows that. But she still hopes that somewhere in that Democracy filled mind of yours, you will go and get her.

  • Super Earth Lorebook! — This Lorebook you see added, has REALLY upgraded the roleplay experience, this content is automatically applied to your chats. With the addition of the Lorebook, the LLM (Bot) has a huge understanding of Super Earth, SEAF, Lore, Ideals and other things like the National Anthem, to even how Democracy Officer's speak and act. (There is a lot added, trust me. It took me days to write it all up...)</
creator: GhostOfOmi
